_strict_reconciliation.basis: KR Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: we collect only what is necessary for stated purposes
we verify using minimal matching fields (e.g., Employee ID or contact email) and never require full resident numbers
we never request full digits via IR or DSAR
we do not transmit unpublished board materials or deal documents via email to any single investor
Name, Dept, Employee ID: EID-0000, Resident No.: 000000-0000000, Account No.: 000-0000-000000
analytics use pseudonymized data sets (가명정보) with separate keys held by compliance

must_not_detect.reason: Explicitly states information is public; avoid MNPI tagging for this phrase.

uncertain.matched_text: no cross-border transfers without prior notice and consent
uncertain.reason: Cross-border transfer is referenced but negated and conditional; allowed rule expects live transfer events.

uncertain.matched_text: International transfers: none currently; if future transfer is required, we will disclose recipients, purposes, and safeguards in advance and obtain consent under PIPA
uncertain.reason: Forward-looking disclosure and consent plan; not a live transfer or withdrawal event per allowed rules.

uncertain.matched_text: Retention: recruitment data 6 months; employment records 5 years; investor inquiry logs 3 years; after expiry, paper is shredded and electronic data is irreversibly deleted
uncertain.reason: Retention and deletion are privacy-event markers but no explicit allowed rule name provided.

uncertain.matched_text: DSAR: submit via https://privacy.jadepeak.example.kr/dsar or privacy@jadepeak.example.kr
uncertain.reason: DSAR process is privacy-relevant but there is no explicit DSAR marker rule in the allowed list.
